sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 71:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 71:1
items.html: When Malchut with the screen in her is not coupling and raising reflected light, she is called a point. In other words, she is like a black point without any white, and in the same manner, at that time there is no light in her because of the restriction that rides on her. She is also called point because of the restriction that occurred in the middle point. (Part 3, Chapter 7, item 2)
